login.tagline: Your schedule and theirs, on one screen.
login.missingFields: Please check your email or password.
login.resendToast: We've resent the confirmation email. Please check your inbox.

signup.title: Create account
signup.inviteBody: Sign up to line up each other's work schedules on one screen.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 30 characters or fewer.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.termsRequired: Please agree to all required terms.

signup.airlineHintDefault: You can pick an airline that's coming soon, too.
signup.airlineHintActive: Upload a photo of your {airline} schedule and we'll read it in automatically.
signup.airlineHintPending: {airline} is coming in July. Until then, enter your shifts manually, and photo auto-recognition turns on the moment it's ready.
signup.inviteConnectNote: Whatever role you pick, you'll be connected with {who} automatically.
signup.nameHint: This is the name friends see.
signup.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, including letters and numbers.
signup.agreeTos: I agree to the Terms of Service.
signup.agreePrivacy: I agree to the collection and use of personal information.
signup.agreeMarketing: I agree to receive update and event notifications.
signup.visibilityDesc: This is separate from schedule sharing. Your schedule is only shared when a colleague requests it and you accept.
signup.visibilityChangeNote: You can change this anytime in Settings → Visibility.
signup.privacyStartsNote: Your schedule starts private when you sign up. You can change visibility anytime in Settings.
signup.confirmBodyLine1: We've sent a confirmation email to {email}.
signup.confirmBodyLine2: Tap the link in the email to
signup.bottomCardBody: Add your schedule and share it with colleagues.

public.title: Public
public.desc: Your name and photo appear in colleague search. Schedules still require separate acceptance.

private.title: Private
private.desc: You won't appear in search. Only colleagues who know your exact employee ID can request sharing.

ktx.title: KTX crew
ktx.desc: I'm a KORAIL KTX cabin attendant.

airline.title: Airline crew
airline.desc: I'm airline cabin or flight crew.

other.title: Other
other.desc: You can use this even if you're not crew.
